title: Curling Links
content:
# Curling Links

### Parent Organizations

* [Grand National Curling Club](http://www.gncc.org)
* [United States Curling Assocation](https://www.usacurling.org/)  
  * member of USA Curling's Diversity and Inclusion: [Ice Breakers](https://www.usacurling.org/ice-breakers) program
* [United States Women's Curling Assocation](http://www.uswca.org)

At the Triangle Curling Club Board meeting on August 15, 2022, the Board voted to pursue at-large membership with USCA while also joining the GNCC for the 2022-2023 season. This path allows our membership continued access to benefits provided at both the national and regional curling levels.

Please see our [Board statement on USCA and GNCC](https://drive.google.com/file/d/18L2q9NszEDv0ny5STfM35vGXKLasuszr/view?usp=sharing) for more details behind this decision.

On October 21st, delegates of Triangle Curling attended USA Curling’s 2022 Members’ Assembly meeting as an at-large club. During this meeting, three motions were brought to the floor as roll call votes. 

This [board statement](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1X51APphyaWWA9vd7w7rxjMQHHI76Q2mS/view?usp=sharing) has been published to address questions regarding Triangle Curling's vote on the motion to remove GNCC from USCA and other motions at that meeting.

### Carolina Curling Clubs

* [Charlotte Centre Curling Club](http://charlottecurling.com)
* [Coastal Carolina Curling Club](http://www.coastalcurling.com)
* [Palmetto Curling Club](http://palmettocurling.com)
* [Charleston Curling Club](https://charlestoncurlingclub.com/)

![Carolina Curling Clubs](/images/CurlingLinks/carolinaClubs.png "Carolina Curling Clubs")

### Curling in the Southeast

* [Atlanta Curling Club](http://atlantacurlingclub.com/), Sandy Springs, GA
* [Peachtree Curling Association](https://peachtreecurlingassociation.org/), Marietta, GA
* [Curling Club of Virginia](http://www.curlingva.org/), Richmond, VA
* [Great Smoky Mountains Curling Club](http://www.curlknoxville.com/), Knoxville, TN
* [Rocket City Curling Club](http://www.rocketcitycurlingclub.org/), Huntsville, AL
* [Orlando Curling Club](http://www.curlingorlando.com/), Orlando, FL
* [Tampa Bay Curling Club](https://www.tampabaycurling.com/), Tampa, FL
* [Loggerhead Curling Club](https://loggerheadcurling.com/), Lake Worth, FL
* [Nashville Curling Club](https://www.nashvillecurlingclub.com/), Nashville, TN
* [Charleston Curling Club](https://charlestoncurlingclub.com/), Charleston, SC

Order from Brooms Up Curling Supplies and support the club!

* Need to order new curling supplies? Brooms Up Curling Supplies will donate a portion of any sale back to Triangle Curling. [Click here](http://www.broomsupcurlingsupplies.com/?Click=692) to order online from Brooms Up!
